game.title: My Friend is a Raven
game.short_text: You must speak with the raven...

details.title: My Friend is a Raven
details.description:
Play as Lutum, the last man alive after a devastating plague has swept the Earth clean.
The world of man has fallen into ruins.  Everyone that was once alive, now lies in their grave, returned to the Earth that they were born of.   You return to your old apartment one last time, in search of a sickened raven.  You must speak to him, and discover why such a calamity has spread across the world.
Complete different puzzles, to unlock all four unique endings, and uncover the whole story behind Lutum, and the elusive raven.
If you enjoyed Cloud Climber, be sure to check out my other game Choo-Choo Charles on Steam!




If you want updates on my newest projects, you can follow me on Twitter here!


My Friend is a Raven will download inside a compressed file.  Simply unzip the file, and open the application named "My Friend Is A Raven".

game.title: Catnip
game.short_text: A groovy feline rhythmn game for the 2019 Epic MegaJam

details.title: Catnip
details.description:
= A groovy feline rhythm game =
Does anyone really know what their cat gets up to when they head out? Take a journey inside the mind of a cat as he explores a space full of his favourite things on his meanderings back home.
Click the left mouse button on the beats when the rings glow, avoid any pink obstacles! Make sure to play until the end...
This game was created for the 2019 Epic MegaJam. We used the spacecats modifier.

game.title: // Down to Earth //
game.short_text: You're a witch trying to get back to Earth after crash landing on a mysterious planet... the space cats are not pleased.

details.title: // Down to Earth //
details.description:
This is a game called "Down to Earth" (named after the theme of the game jam) created in 7 days, if you want to see it expanded and turned into a full game definitely leave a comment below! 
I made all the pixel art and models myself using Blender and Piskel, I also created the soundtrack during the timeframe of the game jam using Ableton Live, it is included in a folder named "MUSIC" so definitely check that out. 
Some of the textures are from the startup content that I modified and also a couple sound effects are from a royalty free website called soundbible. If you want to see my other work check out http://www.luxireally.com or http://www.wickedalley.com
This was one of the most fun times I've had making a quick little jam game!Thanks so much for playing! xoxo

game.title: Data Lost Around The Sun
game.short_text: Retro puzzle game about surviving with your cat on a rouge space station

details.title: Data Lost Around The Sun
details.description:
Computer malfunction sends you way off your orbit into the depths of the Solar System. You're left on your own with a sole companion, a cat named Data.
The computer managing the station cannot be trusted, so you'll have to tend to all systems. Day after day you'll have to arrange the solar panels, check life support system connections, rearrange lighting in botanics and tweak feeding tubes in a meat growing lab. Your only joy will be times spent playing with Data.
You'll have to be down-to-earth to safely get back down to earth.
This is a small pixel-art puzzle game created for EPIC MegaJam 2019 
We hope you would like it! :)
Would you like to know more?
Visit our website: http://loonyware.com/
or Twitter: https://twitter.com/loonyware
Controls: mouse (point&click style)

details.title: Between Worlds
details.description:
Between Worlds is a interactive story game made during Epic's Megajam 2019. It's an unfortunate story about a family that has gone through the worst times in life. It's a mystery novel about being stuck inbetween afterlife. Main character has unfinished business and is denied eternal peace. His soul is stuck in limbo where he tries to re-connect with his long lost family!
INSTRUCTIONSWASD - to moveOnce in house level - you are supposed to follow soul orb to go through the story.We had to cut the story short due to time limitation - so ending might be somewhere confusing, but we plan on continueing development after Megajam and plan on bringing more detailed story with multiple chapters and added gameplay elements.
It's currently in DEMO stage that was specially developed for Megajam with topic Down To Earth. Story is unfinished and planned to unfold in upcoming chapters.

Team name.
  
Lumisoft

List any content that was created before the jam that was included in the final submission:
  
 
  
Our pre-made assets were:
  
Kitchen appliances were half made before Jam,we had to rebuild the set for them to work properly in Unreal Engine.Kids play kitchen
  Baby changing table
  Bird house on the wallEntrance door
  Lamp in baby’s bedroom
 Everything else was made during the Megajam.We included our daughter Nellie as voice actor for one of the characters.
 
  
Assets that were not made by us:
  
1)Flowers – Flower and Plants Nature Pack 2)Trees,grass and landscape material- Environment Set Pack
  3)Dining Table, Chandelier – 3D modelling Tools (Textures changed)
  4)Chairs, glasses, dishes, statue – Crazy Insane Dining Set (Textures changed)
  5)Most textures came from Quicksell Megascans, Texture Heaven, Cc0textures
  6)Sky – Good Sky Pack
  7)Plants – Houseplant Pack
  8)Books – HQ Residental House Pack, Interior Toolkit Vol 1 Pack
  9)Sofa – Free Furniture Pack (Textures changed)
  10)TV – Interior Toolkit Vol 1 Pack
  11)Royalty Free  Music - Aussens@iter (http://dig.ccmixter.org/files/tobias_weber/56664), Doxent Zsigmond (http://dig.ccmixter.org/files/doxent/45486)12)Font - https://www.1001fonts.com/ruthie-font.html   13)Sounds from Soundly

game.title: Cosmo And Yuuko: A Space Adventure
game.short_text: Two cats with an imagination climb on a washing machine headed to the stars! Look out for the deadly cateroids!

details.title: Cosmo And Yuuko: A Space Adventure
details.description:
Cosmo and Yuuko A Space Adventure
A Game by Pastel Sushi Club for the Epic Mega Jam 2019
Winner of Honorable Mention in Epic Mega Jam 2019
Join Cosmo and Yuuko on a journey to the stars aboard the best spaceship ever, The Kleen Masheen! Press the right buttons in the screen or the ship will overheat! Watch out for Cateroids on the way down, Mom is cooking dinner!
Features  3 custom made songs and full leaderboard functionality, cool cutscenes and its available on all 3 desktop platforms! 
Submit your score to our leaderboard, and see who can get back to Earth faster!
Team Pastel Sushi Club is
                
Development: AsobuLab and WillyWatson
Design and Planning:  Garet Nicholas (aka Deviot)
Art (unless otherwise noted): Joyce Lau (aka SaltyyJo)Music: James FurukawaWindows: Just unzip and start SpaceCats.exe
Mac: Just unzip and start SpaceCats.app

details.title: Poto Dont Die
details.description:
Gameplay:

Poto, an interdimensional space cat  that collects a powerful essence in these dimensions called "Aether" has been summoned back by some old friends to do some favors.
PLEASE READ THE IN-GAME TEXT OR THE TIPS BELOW! There's 3 levels to complete, including the starting area which acts as a hub!
Poto Dont Die:
- Gravity defying platforming with very fluid physics based movement system, challenging gameplay and eye pleasing graphics
- Inspired by old school platformers like Banjo Kazooie and Conkers Bad Fur Day
Game was done for the unreal mega jam 2019, if you enjoyed please leave some comments, I'm eager to see what people think about the game.
Instructions:
You can find the controls on the settings in the main menu and in-game by pressing ESC or start on the gamepad, there's dialogue in the game that tells you what to you, but just collect all aether (Glowing purple things) from all levels and then return to the home level to the end the game, you can do some crazy physics movement in this game by fully exploiting the grappling hook and  jetpack.
Tips if you're lost:
- Go up the platforming section and grab the hook then look for the 22 aethers (collectible blue things), they're above the starting area, look at the yellow triangle icons and land on those platforms with the grappling hook
- You can move in zero-g by simply moving forward and pointing the camera where you want to go
- You lose oxygen when in zero-g areas, you gain oxygen waiting in non zero-g areas
- You can grapple to enemies to damage them and finish them off with a combo or use it like a whip and attack from a distance by hooking and then unhooking quick
- Make sure to grab the jetpack, you'll find it on the last platform, it has a blue triangle if you go to the starting area and look upwards
- Once you collect all 22, you'll unlock the two portals in the starting area, from there you can go to the other levels and even return back to the starting area by standing on the portals and holding F or gamepad face button top (Triangle in PS4 or Y in Xbox) for the duration of the sequence (the screen will turn white entirely)
- To finish the game you need to collect all aether from both levels and return back to the starting area, there's no aether on the planets, just the platforms and both maps are on a straight line pretty much (I placed UI markers on the ending spots in the maps, just follow that path), you'll hear a sound once you collect all in a level1. Download the game
2. Unzip and run PotoDontDie.exe
3. If it fails go to FarFrontierStudios_PotoDontDie\Engine\Extras\Redist\en-us and install the prereqs
